Disclaimer: Cravelle assists with the preparation, coordination, and submission of administrative applications and documentation. Final decisions on applications (including company registration, permits, residency, and other official matters) are made by the relevant government authorities, courts, or regulatory bodies. Cravelle cannot guarantee the approval or outcome of any application. Processing times are estimates and depend on the relevant authority.
